'''Bazaar''' was a [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Tales">{{WEGCite|story=Tales of the Smoking Blaster|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook|stext=Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster''}}</ref> located in the [[Bazaar system/Legends|Bazaar system]], a part of the [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The distance between Bazaar and<ref name="Tales" /> the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector's]]<ref name="EAOC Dravian">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for the [[Dravian Starport system/Legends|star system]] containing [[Dravian Starport]]</ref> [[Dravian Starport]] could be traversed in twenty-three [[Standard day/Legends|days]] using a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Dravian Starport–based company [[Topatz Shipping]] offered [[free-trader]]s a job of transporting one hundred [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] of imitation [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstones]] to Bazaar for 4,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Tales" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bazaar was mentioned in "[[Tales of the Smoking Blaster|Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster'']]," a [[roleplaying game]] adventure written by [[Bill Smith]]. The adventure was included in ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Tales" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Bazaar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Bazaar itself, in grid square M-6.<ref name="TEA" />
